Title: ALTER SEQUENCE
Description: Change definition of a sequence generator
See also: DROP SEQUENCE , CREATE SEQUENCE .
Examples:
ALTER SEQUENCE [
schema_name
'.' ]
sequence_name
[ AS
datatype
]
    [ RESTART [WITH bigint# ] ]
    [ INCREMENT BY bigint# ]
    [ MINVALUE bigint# | NO MINVALUE ]
    [ MAXVALUE bigint# | NO MAXVALUE ]
    [ CACHE bigint# ]
    [ [ NO ] CYCLE ]
